name: infosec-council
description: A Claude security suite for EU SMEs: a seven-expert decision council plus three operational teams (red, blue, incident). The council deliberates a decision and returns a calibrated verdict; the red team plans authorized adversary emulation, the blue team builds detection and hardening, and the incident team runs response. ECSF-aligned. Ships as a Claude Code plugin, an npx installer, and a Claude.ai/Desktop council edition.

scripts.test: node scripts/check-versions.js && node scripts/integrity.js --check && node scripts/test-reports.js
